scope_note: Vanderbilt University does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution on the cited official pages used here. The policy section stays official; the estimate card below is third-party and directional.

recommended_gpa.summary: Vanderbilt does not publish HS GPA data for its incoming class on the cited official pages. The estimate below is a third-party directional reference, not an official Vanderbilt cutoff.

estimates.label: Weighted (estimate)
estimates.method: Estimated by PrepScholar because the university did not officially report an average incoming high-school GPA on the cited admissions pages.

recommended_gpa.interpretation: This estimate points to a very strong grade profile, even though it sits below the 4.x weighted estimates seen at some peers. Treat it as a directional benchmark rather than an official Vanderbilt minimum.
